entity: 2009-10 NBA Finals: Los Angeles Lakers def. Boston Celtics 4-3 (iconic Game 7, Kobe's revenge for the 2008 Finals loss)
notes: Indexed from the LAL side (1610612747). The 2009-10 LAL/BOS Finals was a 7-game thriller decided in Game 7 (LAL 83-79); Kobe Bryant won his 5th ring and 2nd consecutive Finals MVP. The 4-3 margin matches BBR; LAL went 16-7 in the 2010 playoffs (4-2 OKC, 4-0 UTA, 4-2 PHX, 4-3 BOS).
